title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 0–3.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're pretty strong, tiny pirates! Shishishishish!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How about we send this guy flying?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: SE... send him flying!? He's freaking gigantic!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: He must have some weak point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You usually would weaken it slowly.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What kind of attack is that!!?

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #3, Franky, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare.
